target:
How's Tokyo?
Did you go to Shibuya? Shibuya!!

D-Don't worry… .
Just… got seasick on the ferry…

(Wait… something's wrong…
Was this the starting point before?)

(No! The "starting point" for the time loop…
Hasn't changed… ?!)

You look pale…
Should I go home and rest?
I'll tell Dad I'll be late!

("There are limits to power"…
That message from Ushio… ! !)

(First time was on the ferry.
Second time was right after landing)

(And this time… third time, after meeting Mio.
It's getting slower each time)

(When I checked the events after meeting Mio…
It seemed like… )

(I guess I'm experiencing the exact same events
As the second loop)

(It seems that events before the loop
Become unavoidable "facts")

(In other words…
There's no way to restart from the ferry.
This is the <color=#GF_KEY_RULELOOP>Loop Rule</color>…)

(The next time I loop, I'll probably wake up
Later than this time)

(I can't fail anymore…
If the starting point comes after the time
When Mio and the others are killed…)

(That means I'll be unable to save them…
No matter how many times I loop… ! !)

(Three days…
Only three days until the festival… ! !
Is it even possible to solve this in just three days!?)

How's Tokyo?
Did you go to Shibuya? Shibuya!!
No… I don't go out much.

(…Same as before.
It's the same conversation again…)

(…The Kofune is crowded now, right?
Summer vacation is peak season, right?)

Yeah! I'm super busy!
But I'm meeting new people all the time.
Recently…

Even people I know
Sometimes look like strangers… right?

…That's right!!
How did you know! ?
Magic! ?
What's going on~! ! ?

I probably sound super standard
In your ears, right?

So cool… ! !
How? How? ! Magic! ?
What's going on~! ! ?

(When I talked on the phone,
I was really flustered,
But I felt a little relieved)

(But this is definitely
Me being tough…)

(Mio is Ushio's real sister.
After her older sister died, today…
She shouldn't be able to stay calm…)

(…That dream is stuck in my head.
I need to protect Mio, huh…)

…By the way, how's the shop?
Is Alan okay?
That's right, summer vacation is peak season.
But I'm meeting new people all the time.

Recently. Even people I know
Sometimes look like strangers…
During this season, there are a lot of tourists…

(…While talking about trivial things,
We walked to the funeral home)
